text-block-1.title: The Foundation of the Matrix
text-block-1.text:
OSGi (Open Services Gateway initiative) is the modular layer that powers Apache Sling. Think of it as the underlying code that structures the Matrix itself - discrete bundles of functionality that can be loaded, unloaded, and updated independently.

In the Matrix, everything is code. In Sling, everything is a bundle. Each bundle is a self-contained module with its own lifecycle, dependencies, and services.

text-block-2.title: Key Concepts
text-block-2.text:
• Bundles - Modular JAR files containing code and metadata
  • Services - Reusable components registered in the OSGi service registry
  • Declarative Services - Annotation-based dependency injection
  • Lifecycle Management - Dynamic loading and unloading of bundles

code-block-1.title: Simple OSGi Bundle Activator
